channel.title: The Silent Architect's Whispers
channel.description: Latest Whispers From The Silent Architect.

item.title: Inside The Cage - You Don't See The Cage
item.description: The cage that holds you isn't closed. Just find the lever.

item.title: The Architect's KVM Field Manual
item.description: Headless. Fast. Surgical. KVM is a battle-tested tool in the Architect's armory.

item.title: When Local-Only And Self-Hosted Matters
item.description: When data exposure is unacceptable - local-only and self-hosted are the solution. It's not paranoia. It's a threat-modeling mindset.

item.title: DevSecOps - Resilience Isn't Optional Anymore
item.description: Low budget and weak hardware aren't an excuse for compromised security.

item.title: WireGuard - Hidden Path In The Shades
item.description: VPN isn't for watching streams. It's the secret path for your private connections.

item.title: Suspend Then Hibernate - Keep Your Blade Sharp
item.description: Your notebook is your weapon. Suspend fast. Hibernate before power runs out.

item.title: Reflections On 2025
item.description: You don't just "apt purge 2025" and start the new year. You carry the scars and improvements. Let's "apt install 2026".

item.title: DeadSwitch Holiday Message
item.description: It's the end of the year. We've time to slow down. Only one message broadcasts.

item.title: Silent Drop: UFW Firewall Role From The Silent Architect
item.description: The firewall layer of GhostWare just received a Silent Drop. Precision. Predictability. No noise.

item.title: LUKS Is Not A Checkbox
item.description: Encryption at rest is the last guarantee. When a system sleeps, only LUKS stands guard.
